arts.ttl: Freiburg vs. Bayern Munich preview: Leaders targeting fifth successive league win
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will look to claim a fifth consecutive Bundesliga win when they travel to Europa-Park Stadion for Saturday’s clash with Freiburg.

arts.ttl: Freiburg vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: So, uh, let’s forget what happened to Bayern Munich in the Champions League and focus on some Bundesliga action. Bayern coach confirmed that Alphonso Davies picked up an injury in the Champions League and revealed that Konrad Laimer is suspended for accumulation of yellow cards (as captured by Twitter account @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany eager to see Bayern Munich attempt to rebound vs. SC Freiburg
arts.sum: All of a sudden, Bayern Munich ’s hot start to the second half of the season was squelched by Feyenoord and coach Vincent Kompany is seeking to pick up the pieces as his squad heads into the Black Forest to face SC Freiburg on Saturday — a task he knows will not be easy. We want to play like that in every game, in the Bundesliga and in Europe.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich midfielder will prioritise Real Madrid offer – contact confirmed
arts.sum: Bayern Munich look to have won the battle for Alphonso Davies signature, but while it is not the same level of priority, they have a fresh war for the affections of Joshua Kimmich. The former Stuttgart midfielder is a free agent at the end of the season, and has not committed to a new deal […] The post Bayern Munich midfielder will prioritise Real Madrid offer – contact confirmed appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Bayern Munich might have trouble rebooting wing position per report; Throwing it back to Talking Heads; Bundesliga predictions; and MORE!
arts.sum: It still feels like Bayern Munich is going to wait Sané out, make him a lowball offer, and bring him back for at least two more seasons. If — and it could be a big if — Bayern Munich knows it will not be able to sell Coman and Gnabry, can it possibly think about bringing Sané back, too?

arts.ttl: Max Eberl and Vincent Kompany discuss confirmed new Bayern Munich signing Tom Bischof
arts.sum: “Tom Bischof is an exceptional player with huge potential, a very good left foot, great set pieces, great passing. Vincent Kompany believes Tom Bischof is ready to get game time for Bayern next season, therefore a loan move is not planned.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Former Bayern Munich boss Julian Nagelsmann extends deal with German national team through EURO 2028
arts.sum: ”In September 2023, when I joined the DFB, I could not have imagined being national team coach beyond the home Euros. We have all created something together - fans, team and coaching staff — that we now want to successfully develop further.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany offers Bayern Munich squad update ahead of Freiburg clash
arts.sum: João Palhinha and Sacha Boey could return to the Bayern Munich squad for their Bundesliga game against Freiburg on Saturday afternoon, but they will be without Alphonso Davies. Konrad Laimer…

arts.ttl: Daniel Peretz committed to fighting for place at Bayern Munich amidst Jonas Urbig links
arts.sum: Despite the expected arrival of Urbig, Peretz has remained resolute in wanting to stay at Bayern and fight for his place in the team. While it is still internally expected at Bayern Munich that both Manuel Neuer and Sven Ulreich will both be getting one-year contract extensions, there could still yet be some movement in the goalkeeping department at the club.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: SC Freiburg vs. Bayern Munich (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: A look at the rosters and injuries for SC Freiburg and Bayern Munich. Streaking Bayern Munich was stopped in its tracks in the Netherlands by a stout Feyenoord squad and now needs to rebound against a somewhat desperate and reeling SC Freiburg side.
